variants.label: A
variants.subject: {{first_name}}, 450M influencer profiles are ready for your API
variants.body_html:
Hi {{first_name}},

We provide creator and audience data via API for influencer marketing platforms: 450M+ profiles across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. Credibility scoring, audience demographics down to city level, fraud signals, audience overlap between creators.

Bottom line: your clients pick creators blindly — or they use your platform to see exactly who's real, where the audience actually is, and how much overlap there is between creators before spending a dollar. That's the difference between a campaign that works and one that burns budget.

Who at {{company_name}} handles product or data partnerships?

Kind regards,
Bhaskar Vishnu from OnSocial
Trusted by Viral Nation, Whalar and Billion Dollar Boy

variants.label: A
variants.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Two things that usually matter most to platforms we talk to:

— You keep your UI, your brand, your workflows. Our data layer plugs in via API — most integrations go live in days, not months.
— We cover the data your clients actually ask about: real vs. fake followers, audience location, age, gender, brand affinities, and creator overlap — so you ship features instead of building data pipelines.

Open to a 15-min walkthrough based on your current product?

Kind regards,
Bhaskar Vishnu from OnSocial
Trusted by Viral Nation, Whalar and Billion Dollar Boy

variants.label: A
variants.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Quick note on how it actually works:

You connect to our API. For any creator profile, you get back: follower credibility breakdown (real people vs. mass followers vs. bots), audience split by country, city, age, gender, language, brand affinities, engagement metrics, and audience overlap with other creators. All real-time, all through one endpoint.

Your team wraps it in your own UI — your clients see it as your feature.

15 min to look at the actual API output together?

Kind regards,
Bhaskar Vishnu from OnSocial
Trusted by Viral Nation, Whalar and Billion Dollar Boy

variants.subject: {{first_name}}, 450M influencer profiles ready for your API
variants.body_html:
Hi {{first_name}},

We power creator data for platforms like {{company_name}} — Modash, Captiv8, Kolsquare, Influencity, Phyllo and Lefty all run on our API.

450M+ profiles across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube with truly global coverage. Credibility scoring, audience demographics down to city level, fraud detection, audience overlap between creators. Your team wraps it in your UI, your clients see it as your feature.

You'll get more data at a better cost than whatever provider you're using today.

I can pull a live demo with your required volume, geo, and other filters on a call — worth a look?

Kind regards,
Bhaskar Vishnu from OnSocial
